dialogos.texto_en: *sigh*\nIt was a tough day today...
I'm really exhausted...
Sorry, everyone. If I had been a little more careful,\nwe wouldn't have caused such a commotion.
No, it's not your fault, Ichika.
Since we were all dressed the same way, I think\nit was only a matter of time before we got caught,\nattracting that much attention.
But I didn't expect it to cause such a commotion.\nAfter the park, we couldn't really do any sightseeing.
Yeah, I felt like we were\njust running around the whole time.
Miku, I bet you and Uesugi-san had it \nreally tough with all that running around.
I'm at my limit...
WHA?!\nYour soul is leaving your body!
Miku, stay strong!
I-it's okay.\nSomehow, I'm still alive.
But, it's been a while since I felt like this.\nIt's like being a kid again.
Yeah, it was kind of nostalgic.\nWe always wore matching outfits back then,\nso people we met for the first time were surprised.
For strangers, quintuplets themselves \nare already quite rare.
That may be so.\nIf we keep going on like this,\nwon't Uesugi-san also be in trouble?
Yeah... If we keep attracting attention\neverywhere we go, it won't be a quintuplets game anymore.
The deadline is tomorrow evening,\nbut it'll be tough to finish like this.
But that doesn't mean we should extend the deadline.
If Fu-kun doesn't give an answer and finishes the trip,\nour relationship might continue to deteriorate.
That's the one thing I absolutely don't want.
Yeah.
He also seems like he's desperately\ntrying to tell us apart%p-2;――
I hope he can sort out his feelings properly, though.
Umm...
Yotsuba?
So, like?\nThe quintuplet game we're playing now\nis to confirm Uesugi-san's feelings, right?
Of course.
We dress up in disguise, and Fu-kun\nhas to identify the person he's chosen\nin his heart and confess to them.
That's right!\nBut, the way Uesugi-san is right now%p-2;――
I feel like he's just trying to figure out\n'which Itsuki is which.'
Yeah, I'm with Yotsuba here.\nI feel the same way.
We might have gone too far this time.\nWe not only disguised ourselves,\nbut also did various things to confuse Futaro-kun.
Ah...\nI also pretended to be one of you\nwhen he was catching on.
So, I wonder if that's why he was so\ndetermined to see through our disguises?
Indeed...\nHe didn't want to deny everything he had built\nup to this point, so he became really desperate...
Hmm, it seems like the purpose and the means\nare all jumbled up in Futaro-kun's mind.
Yet, the deadline is tomorrow.\nIf we don't do something soon...
No, it's okay.
Miku?
Futaro isn't good at romance,\nso he tends to make mistakes in situations like this,\nbut he's still trying his best.
Even though half a year has passed,\nhe still decided to give us an answer this time%p-2;――
It's because Futaro is facing us properly.
That's why I believe in him.
...Well, I suppose so.\nHe's probably serious in his own way.
And, during the hot springs trip a year ago,\nFutaro was able to tell it was me.
Ah...\nWhen we were dressed like Itsuki at Grandpa's house?
Yeah...\nThat's right.
He's got to have improved more from that time...\nNo matter who he chooses, we have to accept it.
I want Futaro to know everything.
I agree.
The time when we had the same appearance\nand personality is a thing of the past now.
Now, we all have different likes and dislikes.\nEveryone has changed.
Since Fu-kun came into our lives as a tutor,\nthings have changed even more, right?
Nino, you say that,\nbut I think you're the one who has changed the most.
Well, you've changed a lot too, haven't you?
Well, I guess there have been a lot of things\nthat have happened in the past year and a half.
I want Fu-kun...\nto understand all of that.
You guys feel the same way, right?
...Yeah.\nWe can change our appearance\nand way of speaking as much as we want.
But we can't change\nthe most important part in our hearts.
If he can realize that, then I'd be happy.
If not, I won't be satisfied.
Futaro-kun may be inept at romance and indecisive,\nbut he tries his best.
He's a hard worker, so it's impolite to say\nthat he can't do it or that it's impossible.
We just have to trust Uesugi-san.
Yes, let's trust him.
...It's finally tomorrow.
Tomorrow...
Well then! Let's take a break,\nand prepare for tomorrow.
Agreed. Miku,\nlet's head back to our room.
Okay. Yotsuba, good night.
Good niiight!
Itsuki-chan, shall we go?
Excuse me.\nThere's something I want to talk to Yotsuba about\nin private.
With Yotsuba?
...Alright.\nThen, I'll head out first.
Have you made your decision, Itsuki?
...I've been thinking hard since then, too.
'Love' is a very complicated issue, isn't it?\nI can now understand why Uesugi-kun\nhas been struggling with it.
And, how much you all\nhave been burning with these feelings.
Yeah...
I will be ready to accept\nwhatever may come, from here on out.
That's why I won't regret tomorrow,\nno matter how it ends.
I see.\nI'm glad we made it in time.
...Yes.
